violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -The red slushy dispenser has a black build-up and in need of cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -The metal rack at the entrance of the kitchen is sticky and in need of cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Hood system and vents are greasy and in need of cleaning.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean 0/2, C NONFOOD-CONTACT SURFACES 23 Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
